# HELP enc_latency_seconds Latency histogram.
# TYPE enc_latency_seconds histogram
enc_latency_seconds_bucket{stage="encode",le="0.25"} 1
enc_latency_seconds_bucket{stage="encode",le="0.5"} 2
enc_latency_seconds_bucket{stage="encode",le="1"} 3
enc_latency_seconds_bucket{stage="encode",le="+Inf"} 4
enc_latency_seconds_sum{stage="encode"} 3.3
enc_latency_seconds_count{stage="encode"} 4
# HELP enc_queue_depth Plain gauge.
# TYPE enc_queue_depth gauge
enc_queue_depth 42
# HELP enc_requests_total Requests, with awkward label values.
# TYPE enc_requests_total counter
enc_requests_total{route="line1\nline2 \"quoted\" back\\slash"} 7
